title: satureja lepida subsp. bolleana
intro: Satureja lepida subsp. bolleana, also known as Satureja bolleana, is a subspecies of perennial herb in the Lamiaceae family, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate various health issues. The medicinal properties of Satureja bolleana make it beneficial for treating digestive issues, relieving stress and anxiety, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Satureja bolleana can be found in teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote overall well-being and health.
